pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates this file at lines 11-24 with exact path and content
setup_nx_witness.sh line 199 defines CAMERA_NAMES array with 'Entrance Camera' as the second entry; lines 204-226 assign these names to discovered devices via REST API PATCH /rest/v1/devices/
This is the name to be created by the agent in the soft trigger rule; verifier.py line 30 expects this value to be present in the rule's eventCondition or comment field
setup_task.sh lines 12-22 creates the manual with this exact URL; this is a synthetic example gate controller endpoint (192.168.1.200 is a private IP range commonly used for local network devices)
setup_task.sh line 19 in the manually-created gate_controller_manual.txt; synthetic test credentials for example gate controller
setup_task.sh line 20 in the manually-created gate_controller_manual.txt; synthetic test password for example gate controller

privileged_info_summary: The environment runs Nx Witness 5.1.5 or 6.0.1 (Network Optix VMS software). The task creates a synthetic gate controller scenario where 'Entrance Camera' (verified as the second camera created by setup_nx_witness.sh) must be configured with a 'Soft Trigger' event rule named 'OPEN GATE' that performs an HTTP POST request to http://192.168.1.200/api/v1/controls/relay1/activate using Basic Auth credentials gate_admin / SecureGatePassword!. The manual specifying these details is dynamically created by setup_task.sh at /home/ga/Documents/gate_controller_manual.txt. All data is synthetic test data generated by the environment setup scripts.
